ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the model (e.g., NCHW) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type used in the model (e.g., FP16, FP32) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the model (e.g., B, W, F) */,
  "spatial_dim" INTEGER /* Spatial dimension of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version control identifier for the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the input belongs to */,
  "in_channels" INTEGER /* Number of input channels */,
  "in_h" INTEGER /* Height of the input */,
  "in_w" INTEGER /* Width of the input */,
  "in_d" INTEGER /* Depth of the input */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input data (e.g., image, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the filter belongs to */,
  "fil_h" INTEGER /* Height of the filter */,
  "fil_w" INTEGER /* Width of the filter */,
  "fil_d" INTEGER /* Depth of the filter */,
  "out_channels" INTEGER /* Number of output channels */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., convolutional, pooling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_filters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "batchsize" INTEGER /* Batch size used for training */,
  "pad_h" INTEGER /* Height of the padding */,
  "pad_w" INTEGER /* Width of the padding */,
  "pad_d" INTEGER /* Depth of the padding */,
  "conv_stride_h" INTEGER /* Convolutional stride in the height dimension */,
  "conv_stride_w" INTEGER /* Convolutional stride in the width dimension */,
  "conv_stride_d" INTEGER /* Convolutional stride in the depth dimension */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used for training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs trained */,
  "gpu_count" INTEGER /* Number of GPUs used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dilation" (
  "dilation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dilation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the dilation belongs to */,
  "dilation_h" INTEGER /* Dilation in the height dimension */,
  "dilation_w" INTEGER /* Dilation in the width dimension */,
  "dilation_d" INTEGER /* Dilation in the depth dimension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dilation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dilation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bias" (
  "bias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bias */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the bias belongs to */,
  "bias_value" INTEGER /* Value of the bias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bias_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_count" (
  "group_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group count */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the group count belongs to */,
  "group_count_value" INTEGER /* Value of the group count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_count_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the model is shared with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
